replies.msg:
Dear Konami Company,

I am extremely appreciated the most updated restricted-list for the Skill and Card today, yet I wanna suggest one more overall restricted-list as following:

1) LAVA GOLEM
This card can be easily special summoned after tributing 2 monsters from Opponent’s field with taking 1000 damages during opponent’s each main phase. Unfortunately, under the components of a large of defence type trap cards, this card hasn’t been easily directly attack the original controller. And the lift point only be 4000 under duel links, thus, after the original controller use a large type of trap cards to endure 4 rounds, finally the opponent will be lost by this extreme-negative card.

2) KOAKI MEIRU ICE
This card is extremely-easily to send any one hand card to the Graveyard to destroy 1 special summon from Opponent’s field, which is extremely influenced the development of SYNCHRO SUMMON as all the Synchro Monster defined as Special Summon. Sincerely, NO any KOA’KI card is INNOCENT

I am a ordinary player from duel links, only purchased more than 18000 packs during my game-life. I wanna the game environment of Duel-Links will be more positive in the future. Please consider my suggestion to improve our game.
